data.title: Aluminum foil packaging market projected to reach $19.21 billion by 2030, reports MarketsandMarkets™.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on January 13, 2026, new data from MarketsandMarkets shows significant growth in the Aluminum Foil Packaging Market. The market is segmented by product type, including bags & pouches, wraps & rolls, and blisters. Additionally, the packaging types are categorized as semi-rigid, flexible, and others. The different types of aluminum foil mentioned are backed foil and rolled foil. This market is mainly utilized in the food and beverages industries. This information indicates a positive trend in the aluminum foil packaging sector.

data.title: BNY Mellon Corporation declares dividends on common and preferred stock; includes quarterly common stock dividend.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BNY), a renowned global financial services company, announced dividend declarations for its common and preferred stock. The Board of Directors approved a quarterly common stock dividend, along with dividends for preferred stock. BNY's stock is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol BK.

data.title: BNY Mellon reports Q4 2025 results, hosting conference call today at 11:00 a.m. ET. Check www.bny.com/investorrelations for earnings release.
data.description: Today, on January 13, 2026, the Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BNY) (NYSE: BK), a leading global financial services firm, has released its financial performance figures for the fourth quarter of 2025. Interested parties can access the company's earnings report, quarterly presentation, and other relevant financial documents on the official investor relations website at www.bny.com/investorrelations. To further discuss these results, the management team will conduct a conference call and live audio webcast at 11:00 a.m. ET today. During this event, forward-looking statements will be made alongside potential material disclosures. For more details, refer to the full news piece on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Scorpio Tankers Inc. (NYSE:STNG) updates on liquidity, debt, and vessel commitments as of Jan. 13, 2026.
data.description: Today, Scorpio Tankers Inc. (NYSE: STNG) shared an update on its financial situation, revealing details about its liquidity, outstanding debt, and upcoming newbuilding vessel commitments. The announcement was made by the Company in Monaco on January 13, 2026. This information provides stakeholders with a clearer understanding of Scorpio Tankers' current financial status and future obligations as it moves forward.

data.title: nLIGHT (Nasdaq: LASR) expects Q4 2025 revenue of $78-80 million, surpassing guidance range of $72-78 million.
data.description: Based in CAMAS, Wash., nLIGHT, Inc. (Nasdaq: LASR), a prominent supplier of high-power lasers for crucial directed energy, optical sensing, and advanced manufacturing uses, has released initial data for the fourth quarter of 2025. Revenue for this quarter is projected to be approximately $78 million to $80 million, surpassing the upper limit of the earlier estimated range of $72 million to $78 million.

data.title: Compax Venture partners with Allot for mobile cybersecurity services, launching brand community as first MVNO with Allot NetworkSecure.
data.description: Compax Venture has joined forces with Allot to launch innovative mobile cybersecurity services. The new brand community, set to become the premier MVNO, will be integrating Allot NetworkSecure, marking a significant milestone in the cyber protection landscape. This collaboration underscores Compax Venture's commitment to providing cutting-edge security solutions to its customers.

data.title: Ukraine joins list of countries banning Polymarket, classifying prediction markets as gambling. Several other nations have already restricted access.
data.description: Ukraine has been added to a list of countries where Polymarket is restricted, joining other nations like France, Germany, the UK, Italy, Poland, Thailand, and Australia. This move solidifies the growing number of countries - now counting a total of eight - where access to Polymarket is limited.

data.title: AI smart glasses market to quadruple revenue in 2026 with sales volume increasing from 6M to 20M units, Apple and Samsung to enter.
data.description: In San Francisco, Smart Analytics Global (SAG) has unveiled its most recent AI Smart Glasses Feature Report, predicting a significant growth spurt in the global AI smart glasses market in 2026. This surge is expected to be fueled by the commercial triumph of Ray-Ban Meta and the upcoming participation of key ecosystem giants such as Apple and Samsung. SAG anticipates that revenue in the global AI smart glasses sector will skyrocket fourfold in 2026, with sales units climbing from 6 million in 2025 to an estimated 20 million units.

data.title: ITT Inc. will unveil its Q4 & full year 2025 financial results and 2026 outlook on Feb. 5, 2026 in Stamford, Conn.
data.description: ITT Inc., based in Stamford, Connecticut, is set to announce its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025, along with its outlook for 2026 on Thursday, February 5, 2026. This update will provide key insights into the company's revenue, profits, and future projections. Investors and stakeholders are eagerly awaiting this information to gauge the company's growth and performance in the upcoming year.

data.title: NextEra Energy (NYSE: NEE) to report Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results on Jan. 27, 2026, before NYSE opening.
data.description: In Juno Beach, Florida, on January 13, 2026, NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NEE) disclosed its intention to disclose its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 before the start of trading on the New York Stock Exchange on Tuesday, January 27, 2026. The details will be available in a news release.

data.title: Immersive Wisdom awarded contract under Missile Defense Agency SHIELD IDIQ with unspecified ceiling amount.
data.description: Immersive Wisdom, Inc., based in Boca Raton, Florida, recently secured the SHIELD contract from the Missile Defense Agency. The contract is an indefinite-delivery/indefinite-quantity (IDIQ) agreement with a ceiling amount of [Insert Specific Number]. This win marks a significant milestone for Immersive Wisdom, Inc. in the defense sector.

data.title: Experienced lawyer Liesbeth Truyens joins Crowell & Moring in Brussels, boosting firm's International Trade Group.
data.description: A seasoned lawyer has enhanced the firm's expertise in international trade, compliance, and regulatory advisory in the EU. On January 13, 2026, Liesbeth Truyens became a partner at Crowell & Moring in Brussels, bolstering the International Trade Group. This move adds significant value to the team and enhances the firm's capabilities in navigating complex legal landscapes.

data.title: MAUI Imaging receives grant from Gates Foundation to explore CET Ultrasound for TB detection.
data.description: In Tucson, Arizona on January 13, 2026, MAUI Imaging revealed they received a grant from the Gates Foundation to assess the viability of using Computed Echo Tomography (CET) Ultrasound for identifying, diagnosing, and prioritizing tuberculosis cases. This study will investigate the effectiveness of CET Ultrasound in TB management.

data.title: Major General Thomas Bouchard joins Academy Securities' Advisory Board and Geopolitical Intelligence Group, consisting of 36 US and UK Admirals & Generals, former NASA Astronauts, and former CIA/FBI Leadership. Academy Securities has been advising clients for over a decade.
data.description: An investment bank, Academy Securities based in New York, has welcomed Major General Thomas Bouchard to its Geopolitical Intelligence Group. The group, known as Academy GIG, comprises 36 distinguished members including US and UK Admirals & Generals, former NASA Astronauts, and former CIA/FBI Leadership. With over a decade of experience, Academy is a leading advisor on geostrategic risk in the markets. Major General Bouchard brings valuable expertise to the team, having retired after serving for an extended period.
